product_overview: Buddy is a personalized voice-first assistant that provides real-time conversational interactions, manages health and personal reminders, and uses contextual knowledge (RAG) to answer user questions. The backend exposes authenticated REST and socket endpoints for sessions, reminders, settings, and knowledge access.
core_goals: Enable secure user authentication and session management for personalized experiences
Provide real-time voice interactions using Gemini Live via socket connections
Support creation, retrieval, update, and deletion of reminders with scheduled worker notifications
Allow users to configure preferences and persist settings
Expose a RAG-backed knowledge endpoint for contextual answers and retrieval-augmented generation

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to register and log in to create a personalized, authenticated session and receive an auth token for protected API access.
user_flows: Navigate to /api/auth/register -> Fill name field -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Register -> Receive 201 Created with auth token -> Store auth token and redirect to onboarding/dashboard
Navigate to /api/auth/register -> Leave required field empty -> Click Register -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation error -> Display field-specific error message
Navigate to /api/auth/login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login -> Receive 200 OK with auth token -> Store auth token and access protected routes
Navigate to /api/auth/login -> Fill email field -> Fill wrong password -> Click Login -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> Show invalid credentials error

features.name: Voice Assistant Session
features.description: Start and manage a real-time voice session that streams audio to the Gemini Live service, receives real-time transcription and audio responses, and handles session configuration.
user_flows: Navigate to /api/voice/session -> Ensure valid auth token is present -> Connect to socket at /api/voice -> Grant microphone permission -> Start speaking -> Stream audio to server -> Receive real-time transcription text -> Receive assistant audio response -> Hear assistant reply

Navigate to /api/voice/session -> Ensure valid auth token is present -> Connect to socket at /api/voice -> Deny microphone permission -> See permission denied error -> Prompt to enable microphone in browser/device settings

Navigate to /api/voice/session -> Connect to socket at /api/voice -> Start speaking -> Server forwards audio to Gemini Live -> Gemini Live returns model error -> Receive 500/503 error from socket -> Display 'try again later' message and allow reconnect
Navigate to /api/voice/session -> Use expired auth token -> Attempt to connect to socket at /api/voice -> Receive authentication error -> Prompt user to re-authenticate (navigate to /api/auth/login)

features.name: Reminder System
features.description: Create, view, update, and delete scheduled reminders for health/personal tasks with backend workers responsible for triggering notifications.
user_flows: Navigate to /api/reminders -> Click Create Reminder -> Fill title field -> Fill date/time field -> Fill optional notes -> Click Save -> POST to /api/reminders returns 201 Created -> See reminder listed in reminders view
Navigate to /api/reminders -> Click Create Reminder -> Leave date/time empty -> Click Save -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation error -> Display 'date/time required' message
Navigate to /api/reminders -> View reminders list -> Click reminder -> Edit fields -> Submit update -> PUT to /api/reminders/:id returns 200 OK -> See updated reminder details
Navigate to /api/reminders -> Attempt to access reminders without auth token -> GET /api/reminders returns 401 Unauthorized -> Prompt user to login at /api/auth/login
Worker executes scheduled job -> Worker hits reminder notification pipeline -> Send push/notification to user -> User receives reminder notification at scheduled time

features.name: Settings and Preferences
features.description: Allow authenticated users to view and update personal preferences and assistant configuration stored in the user settings endpoint.
user_flows: Navigate to /api/settings -> Ensure valid auth token is present -> Fetch user settings (GET /api/settings) -> Display current preferences -> Update preference value -> Click Save -> POST/PUT to /api/settings returns 200 OK -> See updated preferences applied
Navigate to /api/settings -> Ensure valid auth token is present -> Attempt to save invalid preference value -> Receive 400 Bad Request -> Display validation errors and retain prior valid settings
Navigate to /api/settings -> Use expired auth token -> GET /api/settings returns 401 Unauthorized -> Prompt user to re-authenticate at /api/auth/login

features.name: Knowledge & RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
features.description: Provide contextual answers by retrieving relevant documents and augmenting responses using the RAG endpoint and knowledge base.
user_flows: Navigate to /api/knowledge -> Ensure valid auth token is present -> Enter user query -> Click Ask -> POST to /api/knowledge with query -> Receive 200 OK with retrieved documents and generated answer -> Display answer with source citations

Navigate to /api/knowledge -> Ensure valid auth token is present -> Enter ambiguous or empty query -> Click Ask -> POST to /api/knowledge returns 400 Bad Request or empty result -> Display 'please refine your question' prompt

Navigate to /api/knowledge -> Ensure valid auth token is present -> Enter query -> POST to /api/knowledge -> Knowledge service times out or external API fails -> Receive 502/503 error -> Display 'unable to fetch answer right now, try again later' message

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: System for user login and registration with personalized sessions

features.name: Voice Assistant Session
features.description: Real-time voice interaction using Gemini Live

features.name: Reminder System
features.description: CRUD operations for health and personal reminders with worker notifications
